title: Presenter co-brand block (HELM-PHASE4-BUILD-SPEC.md §2 Band D row J2)
description: Optional, unsigned bundle.presenter field — sits OUTSIDE the manifest/objects/checkpoints that verifyBundle() checks, so it can never affect a verification result. Rendered as a clearly-labeled 'Presented by' section, distinct from verified content.

logo.description: Data-URI only (no network fetch) — image/png, image/jpeg, image/svg+xml, or image/webp.
